---
title: "Pin the Headline"
pagetitle: "Pin the Headline"
---

A small game about reading political approval curves. You see a leader's
approval rating over time with the dates stripped, and a real headline from
their tenure — can you pin it where it happened from the curve's shape alone?
Wars rally, scandals slide, market panics fall off a cliff.

Polling series are approximate reconstructions (Gallup, Ipsos MORI, YouGov,
IFOP, Datafolha) and are for play, not citation.

<iframe src="pin-the-headline/index.html" title="Pin the Headline game"
  style="width:100%; height:1050px; border:0; border-radius:14px; background:#0b0d12;"
  loading="lazy"></iframe>

[Open the game full-screen →](pin-the-headline/index.html)

Just here for the Americans? There's a standalone
[**US Presidents edition**](https://jonakelloggdcb.github.io/pin-the-presidents/)
with every president of the polling era, FDR through Biden.
